2603.16839.title: Learning to Present: Inverse Specification Rewards for Agentic Slide Generation
2603.16839.paper_summary: Automated presentation generation remains a challenging task requiring coherent content creation, visual design, and audience-aware communication. This work proposes an OpenEnv-compatible reinforcement learning environment where LLM agents learn to research topics, plan content, and generate professional HTML slide presentations through tool use. We introduce a multi-component reward system combining structural validation, render quality assessment, LLM-based aesthetic scoring, content quality metrics, and an inverse specification reward that measures how faithfully generated slides convey their intended purpose. The inverse specification reward, an "inverse task" where an LLM attempts to recover the original specification from generated slides, provides a holistic quality signal. Our approach fine-tunes Qwen2.5-Coder-7B via GRPO, training only 0.5% of parameters on prompts derived from expert demonstrations collected using Claude Opus 4.6. Experiments on 48 diverse business briefs across six models demonstrate that our fine-tuned 7B model achieves 91.2% of Claude Opus 4.6's quality while improving 33.1% over the base model. The six-model comparison reveals that instruction adherence and tool-use compliance, rather than raw parameter count, determine agentic task performance. We contribute SlideRL, an open-source dataset of 288 multi-turn rollout trajectories across all six models: https://huggingface.co/datasets/KarthikRagunathAnandaKumar/sliderl-multi-turn-rollouts Code: https://github.com/pushing-the-frontier/slide-forge-llm
2603.16839.paper_summary_zh: 自動化簡報生成仍然是一項具有挑戰性的任務，需要連貫的內容創建、視覺設計和以觀眾為中心的溝通。這項工作提出了一個與OpenEnv兼容的強化學習環境，在這裡LLM代理學習研究主題、規劃內容並通過工具使用生成專業的HTML幻燈片簡報。我們引入了一個多組件獎勵系統，結合了結構驗證、渲染質量評估、基於LLM的美學評分、內容質量指標，以及一個逆規範獎勵，該獎勵衡量生成的幻燈片在多大程度上忠實地傳達其預期目的。逆規範獎勵是一個“逆任務”，LLM試圖從生成的幻燈片中恢復原始規範，提供了一個整體的質量信號。我們的方法通過GRPO微調Qwen2.5-Coder-7B，僅在使用Claude Opus 4.6收集的專家演示中訓練0.5%的參數。對六個模型中48個多樣化商業簡報的實驗表明，我們微調的7B模型達到了Claude Opus 4.6質量的91.2%，同時比基礎模型提高了33.1%。六模型比較顯示，遵循指令和工具使用合規性，而非原始參數數量，決定了代理任務的表現。我們貢獻了SlideRL，一個包含288個多回合展開軌跡的開源數據集，涵蓋所有六個模型：https://huggingface.co/datasets/KarthikRagunathAnandaKumar/sliderl-multi-turn-rollouts 代碼：https://github.com/pushing-the-frontier/slide-forge-llm
2603.16839.author: Karthik Ragunath Ananda Kumar et.al.
2603.16839.authors: Karthik Ragunath Ananda Kumar, Subrahmanyam Arunachalam
